mechanism_narrative: Positive 3-month growth in PAYEMS signals expanding labor income and lower recession risk, raising expected corporate revenues and producing positive S&P 500 returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Reject if PAYEMS 3-month growth has a nonpositive walk-forward Rank IC with 20-day S&P 500 returns for two consecutive 3-year rolling windows.

mechanism_narrative: A rise in UNRATE of more than 0.3 percentage points over 3 months signals labor-market deterioration that reduces expected earnings and investor risk appetite, producing negative S&P 500 returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Reject if triggered observations produce positive 20-day S&P 500 returns more than 60% of the time in walk-forward testing.

mechanism_narrative: Acceleration in RSAFS over the prior 3 months signals stronger household demand and near-term revenue momentum for listed firms, producing positive S&P 500 returns over the next 5 trading days after the signal is observed.
failure_condition: Reject if the top tercile of RSAFS 3-month acceleration does not outperform the bottom tercile on 5-day forward S&P 500 returns in at least 55% of walk-forward months.

mechanism_narrative: HOUST crossing above its 12-month moving average signals a housing-led demand recovery that lifts construction, credit, and durable-goods expectations, producing positive S&P 500 returns over the next 60 trading days.
candidate_trigger: HOUST crosses above its 12-month moving average
failure_condition: Reject if HOUST upside-crossing events have average 60-day S&P 500 returns below the unconditional 60-day average in walk-forward evaluation.

mechanism_narrative: Declining INDPRO combined with rising CPIAUCSL signals a stagflationary margin squeeze: weaker real output lowers sales volumes while higher prices raise input and wage pressure, producing negative S&P 500 returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Reject if the joint INDPRO-down and CPIAUCSL-up signal has a nonnegative mean 20-day S&P 500 forward return or adds no explanatory power over the two single-series signals.

mechanism_narrative: FEDFUNDS below 0.25% while CPIAUCSL is still rising signals accommodative real monetary conditions that compress discount rates without immediate deflation stress, producing positive S&P 500 returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: Reject if this joint low-rate positive-inflation regime produces 60-day S&P 500 returns below the unconditional average in more than half of walk-forward years.

mechanism_narrative: Positive 3-month momentum in INDPRO signals improving real activity and operating leverage for cyclical firms, producing positive S&P 500 returns over the next 5 trading days as markets update growth expectations.
failure_condition: Reject if INDPRO 3-month momentum has negative directional accuracy versus 5-day S&P 500 returns in two consecutive 3-year rolling windows.

mechanism_narrative: A negative quarterly change in GDPC1 signals broad demand contraction and rising recession probability, causing analysts to cut earnings expectations and producing negative S&P 500 returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: Reject if GDPC1 negative-quarter triggers are followed by positive 60-day S&P 500 returns in more than 60% of walk-forward triggered cases.
